Name: Ra, the Rising Sun
Effect: When you play Ra, put them into the underworld.

Name: Khepri, the Dawn Scarab
Effect: On Enter: Return Ra from the graveyard to the left location.

Name: Sia, God of Perception
Effect: While on top: If Ra is in the middle location. Double your power here.

Name: Hu, God of Divine Words
Effect: On enter: Move one of your beings.

Name: Anubis, Weigher of Hearts
Effect: On enter: For each opponent, banish one of their beings at Ra's location.

Name: Sekhmet, Lioness of War
Effect: On Enter: If Ra is at the left location, destroy a being with 2 or less power here.

Name: Thoth, Keeper of Secrets
Effect: While on top: If Ra is in the middle location, draw a card at the start of your turn.

Name: Ma'at, Goddess of Balance
Effect: While on top: Ra cannot be banished or moved by opponent effects.

Name: Horus, Sky's Avenger
Effect: On Enter: If Ra is at the right location, deal 3 damage to an opposing being.

Name: Bastet, Protector of Ra
Effect: While on top: Ra cannot be banished while at the same location as Bastet.

Name: Geb, God of Earth
Effect: On Enter: If Ra is at the left location, move them to the middle location.

Name: Nephthys, Guide of the Dead
Effect: On Enter: If Ra is in the graveyard, return them to the left location.
